payload.label: table lamp
payload.long_description: Cream/ivory pleated fabric lampshade with a scalloped hem and small hanging tassels and decorative trim; shade is shown partially edge-cropped (lamp base not visible) and photographed at roughly ~1.0 m from the camera.
